verdict: CeraVe's hydrating cleanser is arguably the best budget facial cleanser available, combining effective cleansing with barrier-protective ceramides and hyaluronic acid. This represents exceptional value in the cleansing category.

_research.name: CeraVe Hydrating Facial Cleanser
pros: Ceramide complex protects barrier during cleansing
Non-foaming yet effectively removes makeup and impurities
_research.con: May require double-cleansing for stubborn makeup or sunscreen.
